chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1817 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 17-01-2024 Mr. Shaharyar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present, no intimation received although this case was fixed today on urgent application moved by the petitioner. Hence this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
